name: HRT_LANG_SUGGESTIONS_VL
query: SELECT LSB.SUGGESTION_ID, LSB.ENTERPRISE_ID, LSB.SUGGESTION_CODE, LSB.SUPPLIER_CODE, LSTL.SUGGESTION_TEXT, LSTL.PROPER_USE_TEXT, LSTL.IMPROPER_USE_TEXT, LSB.MODULE_ID, LSB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, LSB.CREATED_BY, LSB.CREATION_DATE, LSB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LSB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, LSB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_LANG_SUGGESTIONS_B LSB, HRT_LANG_SUGGESTIONS_TL LSTL WHERE LSB.SUGGESTION_ID = LSTL.SUGGESTION_ID AND LSB.ENTERPRISE_ID = LSTL.ENTERPRISE_ID AND LSTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
